doctrine: A retroactive audit does not void the promotion. It computes the honest score so the evidence chain can be completed.

per_batch_evidence.label: Soft-canary soak run 5/7 — EUA cap + partial-settlement boundary

remediation_gaps.name: typecheck_passed
remediation_gaps.action: Add tsc --noEmit to pre-promotion gate in promotion-template.ts
remediation_gaps.urgency_reason: TypeScript errors could reach production without this check

remediation_gaps.name: lint_passed
remediation_gaps.action: Add biome/eslint check to pre-promotion gate in promotion-template.ts
remediation_gaps.urgency_reason: Lint catches class of bugs tests do not

remediation_gaps.name: migration_verified
remediation_gaps.action: Run prisma migrate diff on batch 64 schema change and document outcome; add to pre-promotion gate
remediation_gaps.urgency_reason: Schema changed (externalRef) in batch 64 without verified migration path — financial service risk

remediation_gaps.name: docs_updated
remediation_gaps.action: Hash deep-knowledge doc before/after next carbonx soak and record in artifact
remediation_gaps.urgency_reason: Docs drift silently; hash provides temporal evidence

remediation_gaps.name: codex_updated
remediation_gaps.action: Add quality_mask_at_promotion to codex.json classification_batch field (this batch closes partial gap)

remediation_gaps.name: source_clean
remediation_gaps.action: Run AEG-PROV-001 assertSourceControlProvenance on carbonx repo; add to pre-promotion gate
remediation_gaps.urgency_reason: Source provenance chain broken — cannot assert repo integrity

remediation_gaps.name: no_secret_detected
remediation_gaps.action: Run truffleHog/gitleaks on git diff before next batch; add to pre-promotion gate
remediation_gaps.urgency_reason: Batch 64 introduced aegis-approval-token.ts handling financial tokens with no secret scan

remediation_gaps.name: human_reviewed
remediation_gaps.action: Add carbonx to batch 88-style human review queue for retrospective classification confirmation
remediation_gaps.urgency_reason: Formal human review protocol existed from batch 88 — carbonx pre-dates it
